# @poukai-inc/ui

> Poukai design system — React component library, design tokens, and brand assets.

Poukai is a React component library organised by Atomic Design (tokens → atoms → molecules → organisms).

Version: `1.2.0`

## LLM context

Full brand rules, token semantics, component constraints, and anti-patterns are in `dist/llms-full.txt`.

```
cat node_modules/@poukai-inc/ui/dist/llms-full.txt
```

## Components

Import tokens once at the app root: `import "@poukai-inc/ui/tokens.css"`. Then import components:

**atoms:** `<Wordmark>`, `<StatusBadge>`, `<Button>`, `<Stat>`, `<Eyebrow>`, `<EmailLink>`, `<Tag>`, `<Avatar>`
**molecules:** `<Hero>`, `<RoleCard>`, `<Principle>`, `<FailureMode>`, `<Statement>`, `<Portrait>`, `<Section>`, `<Pull>`, `<LinkCard>`, `<TeamCard>`, `<FeatureCard>`, `<FieldNote>`, `<Quote>`, `<Input>`, `<Textarea>`, `<Field>`, `<Banner>`
**organisms:** `<SiteShell>`, `<Footer>`, `<Dialog>`, `<DialogBasic>`, `<Tabs>`, `<TabsBasic>`, `<Form>`, `<ToastProvider>`

## Tokens

Authoritative source: `src/tokens/tokens.css`. All values on `:root` — color, typography, spacing, motion, radii.

## Exports

- `@poukai-inc/ui`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/organisms`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Avatar`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Button`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/EmailLink`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Eyebrow`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Stat`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/StatusBadge`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Tag`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/atoms/Wordmark`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/FailureMode`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/FeatureCard`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/FieldNote`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/Hero`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/LinkCard`

- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/Principle`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/Pull`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/Quote`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/RoleCard`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/Section`

- `@poukai-inc/ui/molecules/TeamCard`

- `@poukai-inc/ui/tokens.css`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/fonts/*`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/brand/*`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/llms.txt`
- `@poukai-inc/ui/llms-full.txt`
